title: Gym Khana Gulberg 5
description:
This project involved a complete upgrade of the facility, combining contemporary design with practical functionality. From structural improvements to premium finishes, every detail was carefully executed to enhance durability, comfort, and overall user experience.

The renovated gymkhana now offers a refined atmosphere with improved layouts, upgraded interiors, modern lighting, and high-quality materials—creating a space that supports both fitness and community engagement.
